providers.command: python -c "import sys,json; json.dump({'route':'ok','content':'fn process(data: &[i32]) -> i32 { data.iter().sum() } // TODO: handle empty input'}, sys.stdout)"

providers.prompt:
You are a code reviewer. Review the code and respond with JSON: {"route":"approved"|"rejected","content":"your review"}. Route 'approved' if the code meets all quality standards. Route 'rejected' if there are bugs, missing edge cases, or style issues. Always find at least one improvement.

Code to review: {{datarouter.start.content}}

You are a code fixer. Given the review feedback, fix the code and output the corrected version as JSON: {"route":"fixed","content":"the fixed code"}.

Review feedback: {{datarouter.review.content}}

providers.command: python -c "import sys,json; json.dump({'route':'done','content':'Workflow completed: code passed review.'}, sys.stdout)"
